submit.title: Tell us what needs fixing
submit.subtitle: Your report goes straight to your MP's office. It takes about two minutes.
submit.type_label: How would you like to report?
submit.text_placeholder: What's the problem, and where exactly is it?
submit.voice_label: Record or upload a voice note
submit.voice_hint: MP3, M4A or WAV, up to 10 minutes.
submit.photo_hint: JPG or PNG, up to 10MB. Add a short caption if you can.
submit.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
submit.success_body: Your report has been logged and will be reviewed by your MP's office.
